final:
module RefModule(
    input wire A1,
    input wire A2,
    input wire B1,
    input wire B2,
    input wire VPWR,
    input wire VGND,
    input wire VPB,
    input wire VNB,
    output wire X
  wire temp1_(A1 & A2) = (A1 & A2);
  wire temp2_(B1 & B2 & VPWR & VGND & VPB & VNB) = (B1 & B2 & VPWR & VGND & VPB & VNB);
  assign X = temp1_(A1 & A2) | temp2_(B1 & B2 & VPWR & VGND & VPB & VNB);

endmodule
